aiCommentEN: Market stays calm, heart beats fast.
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会继续下跌。
【关键位置】
68,000 美元是关键支撑位。
【短线策略】
可以考虑在 68,000 美元附近做多。
【风险提醒】
注意防范下破 65,000 美元的风险。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may continue to decline in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
$68,000 is the key support level.
[Outlook]
Consider buying near $68,000.
[Reminder]
Be aware of the risk of breaking below $65,000.
